channel.title: run-as-root/awesome-magento2 Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: run-as-root/awesome-magento2 Oct 10th - Oct 16th, 2022
item.description:
Frontends

  • Luma (Magento/luma) - This is actually a default demo theme of Magento 2 itself, which again extends from Magento/blank which extends from the core. But more often, the name Luma refers to the entire stack: XML layout generates a tree-structure of blocks and containers, which eventually render via PHTML templates. The server-side rendered HTML is enriched with CSS (compiled from LESS source files) and JavaScript (RequireJS, KnockoutJS, jQuery).
  • Adobe PWA Studio - A new headless frontend, created by Adobe/Magento, based on ReactJS. It makes GraphQL calls to the Magento GraphQL API to retrieve data. The frontend offers Venia (a demo theme and UI component library), Peregrine (React hooks), Buildpack (Webpack configuration) and UPWARD (a middleware for SSR and image optimization).
  • Hyvä (hyva.io) - An alternative for Luma, which replaces the LESS/CSS with TailwindCSS and the JavaScript with AlpineJS. Currently, it is only available via a commercial license. But for that price, the team works hard to create compatibility modules for 3rd party modules, give support and make the entire solution more and more versatile.
  • Vue Storefront
  • DEITY
  • ScandiPWA

    • Events: Meet the community

  • MageUnconference 🇩🇪 - A Magento Unconference in Germany.
  • MageUnconference 🇳🇱 - A Magento Unconference in the Netherlands.
  • meet commerce - A eCommerce focused Conference in Madrid/Spain.

    • Events: Meet the community

    Meet Magento

  • Meet Magento New York - Meet Magento New York
  • Meet Magento UK - Meet Magento UK
  • Meet Magento Baltics - Meet Magento Baltics

    • Tools

  • Documentation Search for Alfredstars10 - Easily integrate the official Magento 2 Search into your Alfred Workflows.
  • Mage Chrome Toolbarstars308 - A MUST-HAVE Chrome Extension for Magento 2 by MageSpecialist.
  • mage2.dockerstars54 - Nginx(Pagespeed), MariaDB, PHP , Redis, Elastic Search Configurator with Magento 2 installer (updated: 19 April 2020)
  • markshust/docker-magentostars1.7k - Mark Shust's Docker Configuration for Magento
  • Wardenstars308 - A CLI utility for working with docker-compose environments by David Alger
  • AmpersandHQ/ampersand-magento2-upgrade-patch-helperstars232
    • Helper script to aid upgrading magento 2 websites by detecting overrides.
  • PhpStorm Magento2 Extensionstars389 - Official PhpStorm Magento2 Extension.
  • Masqueradestars214 - Faker-driven, configuration-based, platform-agnostic, locale-compatible data faker tool
  • Magento 2 Composer patches helper
    • Chrome extension to create copy-pastable composer patch definition for vaimo/composer-patches.

    • Open Source Extensions

    Development Utilities

  • Cypress Testing Suitestars118 - A community-driven Cypress testing suite for Magento 2
  • Magento Cache Cleanstars454 - A faster drop in replacement for bin/magento cache:clean with file watcher by Vinai Kopp](https://twitter.com/vinaikopp)
  • Scopehints](https://github.com/avstudnitz/AvS_ScopeHint2stars127) - Displays additional information in the Store Configuration by [Andreas von Studnitz.
  • Magento 2 Configuratorstars164 - A Magento module initially created by CTI Digital to create and maintain database variables using files.
  • Magento 2 PHPStorm File Templatesstars39 - PHPStorm Magento 2 File Templates.
  • MageVulnDBstars178 - Central repository for third party Magento extensions with known security issues.
  • Magento 2 Prometheus Exporterstars43 - Prometheus Exporter for common Magento Data.
  • graycoreio/magento2-corsstars57 - Enables configurable CORS Headers on the Magento GraphQL API.

    • Open Source Extensions

    Deployment

  • Deployer Magento2 Recipe - Magento2 deployment recipe for deployer.
  • Magento 2 Deployer Plusstars193 - Tool based on deployer.org to perform zero downtime deployments of Magento 2 projects.

    • Open Source Extensions

    Localization

  • de_DEstars87 🇩🇪 - German Language Package.

    • Open Source Extensions

    Search

  • FastSimpleImport2stars128 - Wrapper for Magento 2 ImportExport functionality, which imports products and customers from arrays.

    • Open Source Extensions

    CMS

  • Mageplaza Blog Extensionstars112 - Simple, but well working Blog Extension.
  • Magento 2 Blog Extension by Magefanstars238 - Free Blog module for Magento 2 with unlimited blog posts and categories, SEO friendly, lazy load and AMP support.
  • Opengento GDPRstars117 - Magento 2 GDPR module is a must have extension for the largest e-commerce CMS used in the world. The module helps to be GDPR compliant.

    • Open Source Extensions

    Marketing

  • Magento 2 PDFstars56 - PDF Generator based on wkhtmltopdf.
  • Google Tag Managerstars237 - Google Tag Manager (GTM) with Data Layer for Magento2.

    • Open Source Extensions

    Adminhtml / Backend

  • Customer Force Loginstars153 - Forces customers to log in before accessing certain pages.
  • Preview Checkout Success Pagestars71 - quickly and easily preview and test your order confirmation page, without the need to placing a new order each time.
  • FireGento Fast Simple Importstars128 - Wrapper for Magento 2 ImportExport functionality, which imports products and customers from arrays
  • Magento 2 Import Frameworkstars128 - A library supporting generic Magento 2 import functionality
  • Menu Editorstars230 - Provides powerful menu editor to replace category based menus in Magento 2.
  • PageNotFoundstars27 - Saves upcoming 404 in your Database with the possibility to created a redirect.
  • Sentry.iostars127 - Application Monitoring and Error Tracking Software for Magento 2
  • Custom SMTPstars303 - Configure Magento 2 to send all transactional email using Google App, Gmail, Amazon Simple Email Service (SES), Microsoft Office365 and other SMTP server.
  • Reset Customer Passwordstars25 - Set a customer password with bin/magento by Vinai Kopp.
  • Guest to Customerstars66 - Quickly and easily convert existing guest checkout customers to registered customers.
  • Reset UI Bookmarksstars22 - Reset UI Bookmarks allows admin users to reset their own UI bookmarks such as state of filters, column positions and applied sorting ( e.g Sales > Orders ).
  • shkoliar/magento-grid-colorsstars54 - Magento 2 Grid Colors module for colorizing admin grids. Supports saving of states with the help of grid's bookmarks. by Dmitry Shkoliar
  • extdn/extension-dashboard-m2stars35 - A Magento 2 dashboard to display installed extensions. by Magento Extension Developers Network
  • hivecommerce/magento2-content-fuzzyfyrstars10 - The Content Fuzzyfyr module for Magento2 replaces real content with dummy content. This is for development purposes, e.g. save time to prepare test data and matching GDPR restrictions.

    • Open Source Extensions

    Security

  • Magento Patch Repositorystars272 - Every Magento Patch you need all in one place

    • Open Source Extensions

    Payment Service Provider

  • Braintree Payments - Official Braintree Integration for Magento2.

    • Open Source Extensions

    Infrastructure

  • Ethan3600/magento2-CronjobManagerstars263 - Cron Job Manager for Magento 2.
  • Clean Mediastars66 - A Module that provides information about Media Files and potential removal options.

    • Open Source Extensions

    Proprietary Extensions

  • Magicento - PHPStorm Plugin to add Magento 2 related functionality.

    • Blogs

    Other

  • MageTalk: A Magento Community Podcast](http://magetalk.com/) - Community Podcast by [Kalen Jordan and [Phillip Jackson.

    • Learning

  • The Magento 2 Beginner Tutorial Class
    • Free YouTube Series for learning Magento 2.
  • magento-notes/magento2-exam-notesstars663 - Preparation notes for Magento 2 Certified Professional Developer exam
  • magento-notes/magento2-cloud-developer-notesstars75 - Preparation notes for Magento 2 Certified Professional Cloud Developer exam
  • roma-glushko/magento2-dev-plus-examstars80 - Preparation notes for Magento 2 Certified Professional Developer Plus exam
  • fisheye-academy/m2cpfed-trainingstars110 - Resources for the Magento 2 Certified Professional Front End Developer exam

    • Official Resources

  • Magento Developer Blog - Developer Blog by Magento.
  • Magento 2 data migration toolstars328 - Official Magento 1 to Magento 2 migration tool.
  • Magento Coding Standardsstars285 - Official Magento2 Advanced Set of Rules for PHP_CodeSniffer.
  • Magento 2 Architecturestars258 - A place where Magento architectural discussions happen.

    • Other Magento 2 related Awesome Lists

  • Awesome Magentostars83 - An Awesome Magento List with mixed M1 and M2 Content by sunel.

    • What is Magento?

  • en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Magento

item.title: run-as-root/awesome-magento2 May 8th - May 14th, 2017
item.description:
Tools

  • Tablerates Generator - Generate Tablerates with an online Tool.
  • Pestlestars525 - Code Generation Tool by Alan Storm.
  • Mage2Gen - Online Module Creator.

    • Open Source Extensions

    Development Utilities

  • Config ImportExportstars129 - CLI Based Config Management.
  • Whoops Exceptionsstars89 - PHP Exceptions for Cool Kids in Magento 2.
  • Developer Toolbarstars293 - Magento 2 Developer Toolbar.
  • Advanced Template Hintsstars243 - Magento 2 Template Hints Helper.

    • Open Source Extensions

  • de_CHstars6 🇨🇭 - Swiss Language Package.
  • fr_FRstars39 🇫🇷 - French Language Package.
  • da_DK 🇩🇰 - Danish Language Package.
  • es_ESstars13 🇪🇸 - Spanish Language Package.
  • pl_PLstars17 🇵🇱 - Polish Language Package.
  • tr_TRstars29 :tr: - Turkish Language Package.
  • ro_ROstars7 🇷🇴 - Romanian Language Package.
  • fi_FLstars0 🇫🇮 - Finnish Language Package.
  • ko_KRstars4 🇰🇷 - Korean Language Package.
  • sk_SKstars0 🇸🇰 - Slovakian Language Package.

    • Open Source Extensions

    Search

  • Algolia Search Integrationstars142 - Algolia Search(SaaS) Integration.
  • Elastic Suite Integrationstars720 - Elastic Suite Integration.

    • Open Source Extensions

    Marketing

  • MagePlaza Seostars120 - Well documented multi purpose SEO Extension.

    • Open Source Extensions

    Adminhtml / Backend

  • Checkout Testerstars70 - Extension to quickly test Checkout changes.

    • Open Source Extensions

    Proprietary Extensions

  • Commercebug Debugging Extension - A Magento 2 Debug Extension.

    • Blogs

    Personal Blogs

  • Alan Storm
  • Fabian Schmengler

    • Blogs

  • Fooman

    • Platforms

  • StackExchange - Q/A Forum.

    • Official Resources

  • Magento Official Website - Magento's official Website.
  • Magento Developer Documentation - Official Developer Documentation.
  • Magento Forum - Community Forum by Magento.
  • Magento Github Repositorystars10.3k - Github Repository.
  • Magento Masters 2017
    • Peter Jaap Blaakmeer - CTO at elgentos
    • Carmen Bremen - Freelancer at neoshops
